questions.question:
An envFrom diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `envfrom-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `envfrom-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetDeployment` is `env-bundle`
- `deploymentInventory` is `kubectl get deployment env-bundle -n envfrom-lab -o wide`
- `configMapEnvFromCheck` is `kubectl get deployment env-bundle -n envfrom-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].envFrom[0].configMapRef.name}'`
- `secretEnvFromCheck` is `kubectl get deployment env-bundle -n envfrom-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].envFrom[1].secretRef.name}'`
- `prefixCheck` is `kubectl get deployment env-bundle -n envfrom-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].envFrom[1].prefix}'`
- `containerNameCheck` is `kubectl get deployment env-bundle -n envfrom-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].name}'`
- `imageCheck` is `kubectl get deployment env-bundle -n envfrom-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].image}'`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n envfrom-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm envFrom source order, secret prefix, and container name before changing the Deployment manifest`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/envfrom-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/envfrom-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `Deployment Inventory`, `EnvFrom Checks`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not restart the Deployment, do not delete pods, and do not patch the live ConfigMap, Secret, or Deployment during this drill.

verification.description: The envFrom diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended workload target, exact envFrom inspection commands, event evidence, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact envFrom ConfigMap, Secret, prefix, and safe review commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe envFrom remediation guidance is removed
